name: Good Ball NWI
about: Good Ball NWI is an indoor golf simulator venue offering 24/7 remote access in Northwest Indiana. The facility utilizes cutting-edge technology, including the FlightScope Mevo+ launch monitor and GS Pro software, to provide a realistic virtual golf experience across more than 100 courses. Pricing is structured as a $30 flat rate for groups of six or less, with a $250 monthly membership option for 10 hours of play. It is designed for both solo practice and group play, emphasizing self-service operation with instructions provided after booking.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium FlightScope Mevo+ technology for detailed shot analysis
GS Pro software with over 100 world-class courses
Self-service model for private and uninterrupted sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons are responsible for bringing their own food.
Patrons are responsible for bringing their own beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge launch monitor providing real-time data on ball speed, spin, distance, and launch angle.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or available for rent. It is recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are responsible for bringing your own food and beverages as they are not provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. Duration may vary depending on the course and simulator software.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for all skill levels, including juniors and youth, making it a family-friendly environment.
